zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Isabella Downton於大約1452年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Thomas Downton24歲，母親Joan Haynes29歲。她於1470年11月12日與Robert Ballard of Horton在英國英格蘭肯特多福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年4月27日在英國享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Isabella Downton于大约1452年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Thomas Downton24岁，母亲Joan Haynes29岁。她于1470年11月12日与Robert Ballard of Horton在英国英格兰肯特多福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年4月27日在英国享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Downton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Downton in Wiltshire, recorded in 672 as Duntun, which has the same etymology as Dunton .

variants.name: Dunton
meanings: English: either a habitational or topographic name from Dunton in Norfolk or Dunton Bassett in Leicestershire, from Middle English doun(e), dun(e) ‘hill’ (Old English dūn) + Middle English toun ‘settlement’ (Old English tūn). The name may also arise from Dunton in Bedfordshire or Buckinghamshire, the first element of which is the Old English personal name Dud(d)a, Dod(d)a. See also Downton .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Isabella Downton was born about 1452, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Thomas Downton, was 24 and her mother, Joan Haynes, was 29. She married Robert Ballard of Horton on 12 November 1470, in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 April 1498, in England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Isabella Downton est née environ 1452, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Downton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Haynes, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Ballard of Horton le 12 novembre 1470, à Dover, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 avril 1498, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Isabella Downton um 1452 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Downton 24 und ihre Mutter Joan Haynes 29. Sie hat am 12. November 1470 in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom Robert Ballard of Horton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. April 1498 im Alter von 47 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Isabella Downton è nata il circa 1452 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Thomas Downton, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan Haynes, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Robert Ballard of Horton il 12 novembre 1470, nel Dover, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 aprile 1498, nel England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isabella Downtonが約1452年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Downtonは24歳，母Joan Haynesは29歳であった。1470年11月12日にイギリスイギリスケントドバーでRobert Ballard of Hortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年4月27日にイギリスで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isabella Downton(이)가 대략 1452년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Downton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Haynes(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1470년 11월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 도버에서 Robert Ballard of Horton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 4월 27일 영국에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Isabella Downton nasceu aproximadamente 1452, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Downton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Haynes, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Ballard of Horton em 12 de novembro de 1470, em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de abril de 1498, em Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Isabella Downton родилась около 1452 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Downton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Haynes, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Ballard of Horton 12 ноября 1470 г. в местности довир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 апреля 1498 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Isabella Downton nació aproximadamente 1452, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Downton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan Haynes, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Robert Ballard of Horton el 12 de noviembre de 1470, en Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de abril de 1498, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
